# GitHub Copilot Custom Prompts
# author: Dan Tembe
# email: dtembe@yahoo.com

Use these specialized prompts based on your development context:

- `.github/prompts/sl1_dynamic_app.prompt.md` - For ScienceLogic SL1 Dynamic App development
- `.github/prompts/sl1_runbook_actions.prompt.md` - For ScienceLogic SL1 Run Book Actions development
- `.github/prompts/sl1_technical_writer.prompt.md` - For ScienceLogic SL1 technical documentation
- `.github/prompts/python_development.prompt.md` - For general Python development
- `.github/prompts/cloud_api_development.prompt.md` - For Python cloud API and integration development
- `.github/prompts/code_explanation.prompt.md` - For detailed code explanation and analysis
- `.github/prompts/human_documentation.prompt.md` - For creating natural, human-like documentation
- `.github/prompts/technical_writer.prompt.md` - For structured technical documentation development

GitHub Copilot will automatically use the most appropriate prompt based on the file you're working with.
